About Me

13+ Years of IT Excellence & Help Desk Mastery

I am Starlin Javier Vilorio Martinez, a bilingual IT professional from the Dominican Republic with over 13 years of specialized experience in Help Desk support, technical troubleshooting, and customer success.

I've delivered enterprise-level support at Thryv, The New York Times, Lowe's, and Language Line, achieving 99.9% system uptime, 40% faster resolution times, and consistently high customer satisfaction.

Specializing in multi-channel technical support, DNS infrastructure management, and customer communication, I combine deep technical knowledge with exceptional service delivery — supporting users globally, resolving complex issues, and maintaining mission-critical systems.

Professional Experience

13+ years of expert Help Desk support, DNS management, and technical troubleshooting across enterprise environments. Specialized in multi-channel customer support, system reliability, and customer success.

DNS Technician & Technical Support
